g.title: gabbro_crypto_stack
g.text: passphrase → Argon2id → X25519 + ML-KEM-1024 → HKDF-SHA256 → AES-256-GCM (header bound as AAD)

g.title: note_aad
g.text: VERSION 7 header integrity (F-01): the entire plaintext header
— Argon2 params, salts, ML-KEM ciphertext, X25519 pubkey,
YubiKey records, alias, passphrase_blob — is the AES-GCM AAD.
Any header tamper makes body decryption fail.

g.title: note_pp
g.text: Passphrase change re-runs Argon2id + KEX and re-wraps
wrapping_key into a new passphrase_blob; key_blobs and
the vault body are unchanged (any one key still opens).
